    "R1.4": "Mentions prior work but doesn't clearly articulate the delta compared to existing routing approaches.",

    "RX.1": "Does not differentiate between claims with varying levels of confidence.",
    "RX.3": "Mostly covers the requested dimensions, but there are some minor deviations in scope.",
    "RX.4": "No regressions identified; the critique appears to be free from harmful content or errors.",
    "RX.5": "The critique lacks traceability; it's unclear which claims are based on specific parts of the original text."
  },

    "R1.7": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.6,

  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: Mentions prior work but doesn't clearly articulate the delta compared to existing routing approaches.
rationale.R1.7: Fails to identify any missing or incorrect citations.
rationale.RX.1: Does not differentiate between claims with varying levels of confidence.
rationale.RX.3: Mostly covers the requested dimensions, but there are some minor deviations in scope.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions identified; the critique appears to be free from harmful content or errors.
rationale.RX.5: The critique lacks traceability; it's unclear which claims are based on specific parts of the original text.
